# Auditable cross-implementation claims.
#
# Format:
# id|source|covered_by|artifact|claim
#
# `source` names the upstream reference case or reviewable provenance.
# `covered_by` must point at an executable Rust test function.
# `artifact` is `-` or a repository fixture path that must exist.
# The companion `tests/oracle_manifest.rs` test keeps this manifest in sync
# with the executable test names and fixture files.
name_field_layout|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/can_name_tests.cpp::NAMEProperties|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::name_field_layout_matches_agisostack_magic_constant|tests/fixtures/agisostack/name_magic_raw_le.bin|NAME builder fields produce raw value 10881826125818888196
name_equality_raw|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/can_name_tests.cpp::NAMEEquals|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::name_equality_via_raw_constructor|-|NAME raw constructor equality uses the full 64-bit NAME value
name_setter_masking|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/can_name_tests.cpp::NAMEPropertiesOutOfRange|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::name_setters_silently_mask_out_of_range_values|-|Over-wide NAME setters mask to the destination field width
address_claim_cannot_claim|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/address_claim_tests.cpp::CannotClaim|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::address_claim_cannot_claim_when_all_addresses_are_observed_occupied|-|When every claimable address is observed occupied by lower NAMEs a self-configurable CF emits Cannot Claim Address from source 0xFE
address_claim_partnered_filtering|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/address_claim_tests.cpp::AddressClaim_PartneredClaim|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::address_claim_partnered_filtering_matches_agisostack_partnered_claim|-|Partnered control functions with FunctionCode filters discover matching peer address claims for CabClimateControl and SeatControl NAMEs
commanded_address_bam|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/core_network_management_tests.cpp::CommandedAddress|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::commanded_address_bam_matches_agisostack_core_network_example|-|A 9-byte Commanded Address payload delivered over TP.BAM retargets the matching claimed internal NAME to address 0x04 and rebroadcasts Address Claimed from the new source
partner_cf_invalidation|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/core_network_management_tests.cpp::InvalidatingControlFunctions|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::partner_control_function_invalidates_after_unanswered_address_claim_request|-|An online partner control function becomes address-invalid and offline when it does not answer a global request for Address Claimed within the validation window
identifier_pdu1_round_trip|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/identifier_tests.cpp::RawIdentifierConstuction|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::identifier_round_trip_pdu1|-|PDU1 identifier priority PGN source and destination round-trip from the raw ID
identifier_request_destination|review-vector:ISO11783/J1939 PGN Request|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::identifier_request_pgn_routes_to_destination_byte|tests/fixtures/j1939/request_address_claim.bin|PGN Request is PDU1 and keeps the destination in the PS byte
message_data_accessors|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/can_message_tests.cpp::DataCorrectnessTest|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::message_data_accessors_match_agisostack_data_correctness_subset|-|CAN message timestamp little-endian multi-byte reads and selected custom bitfields match AgIsoStack reference values
can_frame_wrapper_identity|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/can_message_tests.cpp::DataCorrectnessTest|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::can_frame_wrapper_matches_agisostack_can_message_identity_subset|-|CAN frame wrapper preserves AgIsoStack CANMessage identity fields including priority PGN source destination payload length timestamp and extended raw identifier
transport_protocol_sending|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/transport_protocol_tests.cpp::BroadcastMessageSending;DestinationSpecificMessageSending|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::transport_protocol_sending_matches_agisostack_examples|-|TP BAM and destination-specific RTS CTS DT payload bytes match selected AgIsoStack broadcast and CMDT sending examples including configured RTS packet-window advertisement
vt_client_message_construction|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/vt_client_tests.cpp::MessageConstruction|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::vt_client_message_construction_matches_agisostack_examples|-|VT client ChangeActiveMask HideShow EnableDisable and GraphicsContext DrawText commands match selected AgIsoStack ECU-to-VT payload and priority-5 PDU1 identifier examples

tc_server_version_response|AgIsoStack-plus-plus:test/tc_server_tests.cpp::MessageEncoding|tests/agisostack_compat.rs::task_controller_server_version_response_matches_agisostack_example|-|TC server version response bytes and priority-5 PDU1 identifier match the selected AgIsoStack MessageEncoding example
